name: Magic Wands
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the white chocolate using a double boiler or microwave.
2. Stir in red and yellow food coloring until desired color is achieved.
3. Dip pretzel rods into the melted chocolate, coating them evenly.
4. Place coated rods on parchment paper or wax paper to set.
5. Sprinkle with sprinkles as desired once fully set.
6. Once completely cooled, cut ribbon lengths and tie around each wand for decoration.
